stemHtml: Which statement correctly describes the principle of SBAS operation?

options.a: A correction signal is broadcast from geostationary satellites to GNSS receivers located in a small, local area
options.b: A correction signal is broadcast from ground-based transmitters to GNSS receivers located in a small, local area
options.c: A correction signal is broadcast from ground-based transmitters to GNSS receivers distributed over a wide area
options.d: A correction signal is broadcast from geostationary satellites to GNSS receivers distributed over a wide area
